# Cimd.IsValidClientIdUrl method

Returns `true` when *clientId* is a syntactically valid CIMD `client_id` URL: an absolute `https` URL with a (non-root) path component (R-23.4-e). A bare-origin URL (path `/`) is rejected.

```csharp
public static bool IsValidClientIdUrl(string clientId)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| clientId | The candidate `client_id` URL. |

## Return Value

`true` when valid.
